name: Fox Corp
summary: The provided text is Fox Corporation's Insider Trading and Confidentiality Policy (Exhibit 19), not a business description. It covers legal prohibitions on insider trading, tipping, short sales, derivatives, margin purchases, hedging, and pledging of FOX securities. It also outlines blackout periods and Rule 10b5-1 trading plan requirements for employees, directors, and Section 16 Reporting Persons. No business operations, products, or services are described in this section.
